name: Chest-Supported Row
resistance_profile: Even tension through the row; chest support removes lower-back involvement so you can train the back hard near failure.
rom_notes: Allow the shoulder blades to protract and arms to extend fully at the front, then retract and row to the torso.
cues: Let the shoulder blades stretch forward at the front
Row with the elbows, squeeze the back
Keep the chest on the pad (no torso english)
common_errors: Short range at the contracted end only
